title: Marketing Essentials
description:
Master marketing basics with Adelaide University  
 There are many common mistakes businesses make in their marketing efforts, such as spending high amounts or starting campaigns without a clear reason why. 
 This four-week course from Adelaide University will help demystify marketing to ensure you master marketing fundamentals and avoid marketing mistakes. 
  What will you learn?  
 Whether you run your own business, you want to develop in your current role, or you simply want an introduction to the principals of marketing, this course will arm you with the marketing strategies to grow your business. 
  Learn to identify customer needs  
 To successfully target your audience, you first need to understand who your customers are. On the course, you’ll learn how to identify your customers and their needs. 
 With this knowledge, you’ll learn how to create a marketing message and strategy that not only aligns with your customer needs, but also meets the needs of an ever-changing audience. 
  Delve into your marketing channels  
 Next, you’ll explore the marketing channels available to you and how your customers use these channels. 
 You’ll learn the best practices of each marketing channel to reach and connect with your audience with the right language and product features. 
  Understand the marketing landscape  
 On the final week of the course, you’ll discover how the market landscape continues to change and how the pandemic has impacted customers. Through this exploration, you’ll learn how you can effectively respond to these changes. 
 By the end of the course, you’ll have a firm grasp of marketing fundamentals, know how to connect to your customers, and will have the mindset you need for continued success. 
  Who should study this marketing fundamentals course?  
 This course is aimed at: 
 
 Business owners 
 People new to marketing 
 People taking on a marketing role 
 Business leaders without marketing experience
